description.value:
This snare magically contains a pressurized jet of water activated by an invisible sensor. When a creature enters the snare's square, a powerful blast of water deals @Damage[4d10[bludgeoning]] damage to the creature and potentially pushes them. You determine the direction of the blast of water when crafting the snare. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:24] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is pushed 10 feet in the determined direction.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is pushed 15 feet in the determined direction, and is drenched with water, taking a –1 circumstance penalty to saving throws against electricity effects for 1 minute.
